auto.liability: We strictly recommend 250k/500k/100k bodily injury and property damage limits. Anything lower, especially 100/300, is a major risk for asset exposure.
auto.medical_payments: Optional, but $5,000 is standard if requested.
auto.comprehensive_deductible: Recommend $500 or $1000 to keep premiums down.
auto.collision_deductible: Recommend $1000. People should have enough liquid savings to cover a $1000 incident.
auto.glass_windshield: Skip this. It is cheaper to pay $300 out of pocket for a windshield than to pay massive premium hikes for years because a glass claim touched the CLUE report.
auto.rental_reimbursement: Only necessary if the client doesn't have a backup vehicle or the means to rent one for 30 days.

home.dwelling_coverage: Must be 100% Replacement Cost. Never Actual Cash Value.
home.deductible: Recommend 1% or 2% wind/hail, and $2500 All Other Perils. High deductibles prevent small, nuisance claims that lead to cancellation.
home.water_backup: Crucial. Must have at least $10,000-$25,000 water backup coverage.

general.bundling: Always highlight if the home and auto are not bundled, as this leaves a 15-20% discount on the table.
general.umbrella: Any client with net worth over $500k or youthful drivers in the household MUST be quoted a $1M or $2M umbrella policy.
